content.problemStatement:
Write a program to output the square of * (stars) of size 4 (check the output below).


`****
****
****
**** 
`
content.outputFormat: Print a square of asterisk characters of size 4. Each line contains exactly four '*' characters. Lines are separated by a newline.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints four rows, each containing four asterisks.
Even with no input, the output is always the same 4x4 star square.

solution.approach: The program does not need to read any data. It simply prints four rows, each consisting of four asterisk characters. A dummy test case count T=1 is used so that the code follows the common template of looping over test cases.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – constant work to output 16 characters.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few loop counters.

code.Java:
import java.io.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[] args)throws Exception{int T=1;StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();for(int t=0;t<T;++t){for(int i=0;i<4;++i){sb.append("****");sb.append('\n');}}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
